subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Samandar, inasmuch as the Lord of Destiny hath made mention of thee from the Most Great Horizon, when He heard thy call in the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا سمندر بما یذکرک مالک القدر فی المنظر الاکبر اذ سمع ندآئک فی الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
